reviews.school_name: The New Green Field Public Academy - Indore
reviews.author: Sumitra satpahadiya
reviews.review_body: The studies are good, there is improvement in the children, the teachers are good, the staff is also good but due to the classes of children of classes 1 to 5 being on the top floor, the children have to face a lot of problems. Please get the classes of children from class 1 to 5 also started on the ground floor. This is our request to you.
